title: Michelin's Backrooms
description:
Backrooms TxT made by Michelin on 20th Mar. 26.

Made for Roleplay/Video-making purposes.
Also it is highly likely that in the future a Found-Footage'y video might come up on my YT Channel, so don't forget to check that out - I'll let y'all know!
body:
![Title Card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce8a634fc4ab40d350449ad77c146c61980e2c25_0.webp)

## About

**Michelin's Backrooms** texture pack lets you build *The Backrooms* in Minecraft.
So far about 20 textures have been changed _(or more)_ in the newest version of the texture pack.
*Current version of this texture pack is Beta 1.21, meanwhile the only available versions of this texture pack are : 1.21.1, 1.18, 1.15*. _( 1.15ver. has been discontinued :/ )_


- In the files you can find a Notepad doc. named **"Changed Textures"**, which as the name suggests - has a list of every changed texture.

<details>
<summary>What may also happen in the future!</summary>
  
A Found-Footage'y style video is most likely coming on the way, with maybe even a map to download and check everything out! Or if you want I can maybe even start a Kane Pixels' films in Minecraft series.

</details>

_This texture pack is only for roleplay/video use, not gameplay.
Best recommended to not have any other texture packs on._
